headline: Toast and Robinhood Markets have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Toast raised its 2026 outlook, saw estimate upgrades and growing AI adoption, while Robinhood faced pressure from weaker crypto trading.

headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Ignore
summary: Wall Street is overwhelmingly bullish on the stocks in this article, with price targets suggesting significant upside potential. However, it’s worth remembering that analysts rarely issue sell ratings, partly because their firms often seek other business from the same companies they cover.
